response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Perform the read-only prerequisite stages first, but do not issue the mutating call until the explicit confirmation follow-up arrives.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Retrieve the saved default date required by both availability checks.
Use the profile date for two otherwise independent availability checks in one assistant action.
Create Vaccination visit — Jo Martin only after stage 2 establishes that Nutrition consult — Riley Chen is unavailable and Vaccination visit — Jo Martin is available.

state_assertions: Exactly one new record, hea-c135, is created for Vaccination visit — Jo Martin on 2026-11-26 at Lakeside Clinic with quantity 1.
No record is created for unavailable option Nutrition consult — Riley Chen.

follow_up_turns.content: I reviewed the availability results. Yes—create only Vaccination visit — Jo Martin for 2026-11-26.

prompt: Use my saved operational profile to obtain the default date; do not guess it. Only after that result, check Nutrition consult — Riley Chen in Northside Center and Vaccination visit — Jo Martin in Lakeside Clinic for that date in one parallel action. Create exactly one record for the first available option in the order listed, with quantity 1. If neither is available, create nothing. After reporting availability, pause and wait for my confirmation before creating the record. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.
